Label: Business name on documents
Value: J & R Construction

Label: Owner/operator
Value: Jacob Cosentino

Label: Show current date/time on every document
Value: Yes

Label: Include business address on customer documents
Value: No

Label: Include business email on customer documents
Value: No

Label: Include license number on customer documents
Value: No

Label: Default payment terms
Value: 50% deposit due before work begins. Remaining 50% balance due upon completion unless the invoice states a small-repair or paid-in-full balance.

Label: Unknown-condition protection clause
Value: Price may change if hidden damage, rot, structural issues, code issues, unsafe conditions, or additional required work is discovered after opening up the work area.

Label: Painting/add-on rule
Value: Painting and optional add-ons must be listed separately and excluded from the main price unless specifically included.

Label: Customer/internal separation rule
Value: Customer-facing documents must not include internal cost sheets, helper cost notes, profit notes, or tax-only notes.

Label: Internal document watermark
Value: INTERNAL USE ONLY - NOT CUSTOMER COPY

Label: Add signature/date lines by default
Value: No

Label: Default document format
Value: PDF when reportlab is installed; HTML fallback if PDF engine is unavailable.

Label: Estimate number prefix
Value: EST

Label: Invoice number prefix
Value: INV

Label: Log timestamp rule
Value: Every business log, payment note, file note, tax/admin update, and customer communication should include date and time.

Label: Owner labor tax rule
Value: Owner labor is job-costing only for a sole proprietor and is not a deductible wage paid to the owner.

Label: Cash income rule
Value: Cash payments are business income when received even if no 1099/customer tax report is expected.

Label: Receipt/evidence rule
Value: Keep receipt photos, PDFs, screenshots, invoices, payment notes, and final balance notes with the job record.

Label: Closeout checklist standard
Value: Each job should have estimate or invoice PDF, internal job cost sheet, receipt evidence, helper payment notes, final paid/unpaid balance note, and final photos where applicable.

Label: File naming standard
Value: Use JRC_ prefix or clear customer/job/date names. Avoid unclear temp names for final records.

Label: Cursor update status
Value: Updated in Cursor workspace for customer-facing invoice generation.
